## Calculates Pi using Python

#### More iterations means more accuracy at the expense of more time

#### Iterations: 1
```4```

#### Iterations: 10
```3.232315809405592687326433456464416216738198162346769157914668750582063275561727574111475040267609926```

#### Iterations: 100

#### Iterations: 100,000
```3.141602653489793988460143364529440394040917831472762036846331303482711437961073654096918976224047121```
